title: Deep Hollows
description: Changes the stone textures in the crystall hollows on hypixel skyblock to deepslate
body:
# SkyOcean - Deep Hollows
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1296157888343179264?color=8c03fc&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/FsRc2GUwZR) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/dIczrQAR?style=flat&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyocean)
Deep hollows changes the crystall hollows to be made out of deepslate, it replaces all stone and cobblestone with its respective deepslate variant. It uses vanilla texture paths so it should be compatible with other resource packs. ## Installation Guide - Prerequisites: [SkyOcean](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyocean) - You must also enable the option `Retexture Hollows` - Download in your favourite launcher or into your resourcepacks folder directly
